title: Add support for function calls in with statements

features.name: function call referencing with-closure variable
features.description: Code should include a function call inside a with-expression where the function references the with-closure variable

features.name: array method with with-clause expression
features.description: Code should include an array method call with a with-clause expression
features.snippet:
int arr[4] = '{1, 2, 3, 4};
int result = arr.find_first(item) with (item > 0);
